output:
Here is the extracted commercial terms table:

| Field | Value (with section reference) |
|---|---|
| Issuer | Nordhavn Industri AB (publ), a Swedish public limited liability company (Indicative Terms table) |
| Guarantors | Nordhavn Group AB (parent); each material subsidiary representing >5% of group EBITDA or assets, on an "iterative testing" basis as at each interest payment date (Indicative Terms table) |
| Instrument type | Senior secured callable floating rate notes (Indicative Terms table — "Instrument") |
| Principal amount | SEK 1,500,000,000 initial; framework amount SEK 2,500,000,000 (allowing up to SEK 1,000m of subsequent tap issues subject to incurrence test) (Indicative Terms table) |
| Coupon | Floating: 3-month STIBOR (0.00% floor) + 4.75% per annum margin; quarterly in arrears; Actual/360 (Indicative Terms table — "Interest rate") |
| Tenor / maturity date | 5 years (NC2); maturity 12 June 2031 (Indicative Terms table — "Tenor") |
| Issue price | 100.000% (Indicative Terms table) |
| Use of proceeds | Refinance existing SEK 1,250m senior secured notes 2022/2027 in full, with the balance for general corporate purposes including potential bolt-on acquisitions (Indicative Terms table — "Use of proceeds") |
| Optional redemption schedule | Before 12 June 2028: make-whole (T+50bps); 12 Jun 2028–11 Jun 2029: 102.375%; 12 Jun 2029–11 Jun 2030: 101.188%; from 12 Jun 2030: 100.000%. Equity claw: up to 35% at 104.75% prior to 12 June 2028 from equity offering proceeds (section "Optional redemption") |
| Change-of-control provision | Put at 101% of principal plus accrued interest; triggered if any person/group acting in concert (other than existing controlling shareholders) acquires more than 50% of voting rights in Nordhavn Group AB (section "Change of control") |
| Incurrence covenant test | Net Interest-Bearing Debt / EBITDA ≤ 3.50x on or before second anniversary of issue date; ≤ 3.25x thereafter; LTM EBITDA with synergy add-backs up to 25% of run-rate cost savings, subject to 18-month look-forward cap (section "Incurrence covenants") |
| Restricted payments basket headline | Permitted only if no EoD continuing AND pro forma Net Debt/EBITDA ≤ 3.00x AND aggregate RPs since issue date ≤ 50% of consolidated net income plus a SEK 50m starter basket (section "Restricted payments") |
| Negative pledge headline | General negative pledge with carve-outs for notes security, existing/disclosed security, operation-of-law liens, after-acquired property liens, and a general basket of SEK 75m in aggregate (section "Negative pledge") |
| Trustee / paying agent | Trustee/Security Agent: Nordic Trustee & Agency AB (publ); Paying Agent: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB (publ) (Indicative Terms table) |
| Listing exchange | Corporate Bond List of Nasdaq Stockholm; admission to trading within 60 days of issue date (Indicative Terms table — "Listing") |
| Governing law | Swedish law (Indicative Terms table) |

# Fjordkraft Energi Holding AS — Senior Unsecured Green FRN due 2030

| Field | Value (with section reference) |
|---|---|
| Issuer | Fjordkraft Energi Holding AS, a Norwegian private limited liability company (Indicative Terms table) |
| Guarantors | None at issuance; Issuer covenants to procure within 90 days an upstream guarantee from any post-issuance subsidiary representing >10% of group EBITDA (Indicative Terms — Guarantors) |
| Instrument type | Senior unsecured floating rate notes, marketed under the Issuer's Green Bond Framework dated April 2026; ranking senior unsecured, pari passu (Indicative Terms — Instrument / Ranking) |
| Principal amount | EUR 250,000,000 initial; framework amount of EUR 500,000,000 with tap issuance permitted subject to incurrence test (Indicative Terms — Initial principal amount / Framework amount) |
| Coupon | Floating: 3-month EURIBOR (0.00% floor) + 3.25% margin p.a.; quarterly Act/360; +25 bps step-up if Sustainalytics ESG rating falls below "Medium Risk" (subject to 90-day cure) (Indicative Terms — Interest rate / Step-up) |
| Tenor / maturity | 4 years (NC1); maturity 18 September 2030 (Indicative Terms — Tenor) |
| Issue price | 100.000% (Indicative Terms — Issue price) |
| Use of proceeds | Refinance existing EUR 200m 2022/2027 senior unsecured notes and finance/refinance Eligible Green Projects (onshore wind, offshore wind transmission, green hydrogen electrolysers) (Indicative Terms — Use of proceeds) |
| Optional redemption schedule | Before 18-Sep-2027: make-whole (Bund + 50bps); 18-Sep-2027 to 17-Sep-2028: 103.000%; 18-Sep-2028 to 17-Sep-2029: 101.500%; from 18-Sep-2029: 100.000% (raised to 100.500% if Scope 1&2 emissions reduction ≥30% vs. 2022 not achieved by 31-Dec-2029); no equity claw (Optional redemption section) |
| Change-of-control provision | Put at 101% plus accrued interest; triggered if any person/group acting in concert (excluding existing controlling shareholder group, pension funds, sovereign wealth funds) acquires >50% of voting rights (Covenant package — Change of control) |
| Incurrence covenant test | Net Debt/EBITDA ≤ 5.00x (with add-back for greenfield start-up losses for 24 months from COD) AND Net Debt/RCF ≤ 6.50x (Covenant package — Incurrence covenants) |
| Restricted payments basket headline | Permitted only if no EoD continuing AND pro forma Net Debt/EBITDA ≤ 4.25x; starter basket EUR 25m plus 50% of consolidated net income since issue date (Covenant package — Restricted payments) |
| Negative pledge headline | No security by Issuer/Material Subsidiaries over assets for financial indebtedness, subject to carve-outs including project SPV security, existing security, ordinary-course tax/statutory/bank-account security, and a general basket of EUR 30m (Covenant package — Negative pledge) |
| Trustee / paying agent | Bond Trustee: Nordic Trustee AS (illustrative); Paying agent: Nordic Trustee AS (illustrative) (Indicative Terms table) |
| Listing exchange | Oslo Børs ABM (Alternative Bond Market), Sustainable Bond segment (Indicative Terms — Listing) |
| Governing law | Norwegian law (Indicative Terms — Governing law) |

| Field | Value (with section reference) |
|---|---|
| Issuer | Karelis Real Estate ApS, a Danish private limited liability company (Indicative Terms table) |
| Guarantors | Karelis Property Holding A/S (parent); all wholly-owned propco subsidiaries of the Issuer, with carve-outs for SPVs holding properties financed by ring-fenced mortgage debt (Indicative Terms table) |

| Optional redemption schedule | Before 5 Nov 2028: make-whole (Bund + 50 bps); 5 Nov 2028–4 Nov 2029: 102.125%; 5 Nov 2029–4 Nov 2030: 101.063%; from 5 Nov 2030: 100.000%. Equity claw: up to 40% at 104.25% before 5 Nov 2028 using equity proceeds. Tax call at par. (Optional redemption section) |
| Change-of-control provision | Put at 101% plus accrued interest; triggered by any person/group (other than existing controlling shareholder/affiliates) acquiring >50% of voting rights in Karelis Property Holding A/S or the Issuer, or existing controlling shareholder ceasing to hold ≥30% of voting rights in Karelis Property Holding A/S (Covenant package — Change of control) |
| Incurrence covenant test | Additional debt requires pro forma: LTV ≤ 55%; Secured LTV ≤ 45%; ICR ≥ 1.75x (LTM) (Covenant package — Financial covenants, incurrence basis) |
| Restricted payments basket headline | Permitted only if no EoD, LTV ≤ 50% pro forma, ICR ≥ 2.00x pro forma; starter basket of EUR 15m plus 50% of consolidated FFO since issue date (Covenant package — Restricted payments) |
| Negative pledge headline | Standard real-estate negative pledge; carve-outs for propco mortgage security, statutory/bank account security, and a general basket of EUR 20m in aggregate (Covenant package — Negative pledge) |
| Trustee / paying agent | Trustee/Security Agent: Nordic Trustee & Agency AB (publ) (illustrative); Paying Agent: Danske Bank A/S (illustrative) (Indicative Terms table) |
| Listing exchange | Nasdaq Copenhagen, Corporate Bonds segment (Indicative Terms table, "Listing") |
| Governing law | Danish law (with Swedish law security documents for Swedish-situated properties) (Indicative Terms table, "Governing law") |

**Notes for analyst review:** Several covenant-level fields (call schedule, CoC put price, incurrence tests, RP basket, negative pledge carve-out, trustee, governing law, listing) are typically located in the "Description of the Notes" section of the prospectus supplement, which was truncated from the document provided. To complete the term sheet, pull the full "Description of the Notes" section (pp. S-23 et seq.) and the base indenture dated December 16, 1993.

Par call: on/after January 1, 2030 (2030 notes) and on/after November 1, 2034 (2035 notes), redeemable at 100% of principal + accrued interest ("Description of Notes—Optional Redemption"; Cover page) |
| Change-of-control provision | Upon a "Change of Control Triggering Event," issuers may be required to offer to repurchase the notes at 101% of principal + accrued and unpaid interest. Specific CoC threshold/definition NOT STATED in extracted text (full definition in "Description of Notes—Change of Control Triggering Event," not reproduced) (Cover page) |
| Incurrence covenant test (e.g., Net Debt/EBITDA) | NOT STATED in the extracted text |
| Restricted payments basket headline | NOT STATED in the extracted text |
| Negative pledge headline (general carve-out size) | NOT STATED in the extracted text (note: prior Senior Notes' collateral was released upon achievement of investment grade rating, per "Basis of Presentation") |
| Trustee / paying agent | NOT STATED in the extracted text |
| Listing exchange | None — "The notes will not be listed on any stock exchange, and currently there is no public market for the notes." (Cover page) |

### Additional notes for the analyst
- **Underwriting economics:** Gross proceeds $1,496.349m; underwriting discount $8.30m (0.500% on 2030s, 0.600% on 2035s); net proceeds to issuers $1,488.049m.
- **Settlement:** On or about October 8, 2024, book-entry through DTC (with Euroclear/Clearstream).
- **Ranking:** Senior unsecured; pari passu with revolving credit facility guarantees and existing Senior Notes; senior to future subordinated indebtedness of guarantors.
- **Joint book-runners:** Barclays, Citi, Goldman Sachs, J.P. Morgan, Société Générale, Wells Fargo (plus 12 additional joint book-runners listed).
- Several covenant-package details (incurrence tests, RP basket, negative pledge carve-outs, trustee identity, governing law) reside in the "Description of Notes" section beyond the truncated portion of the document and could not be extracted; recommend pulling the full S-12 et seq. for definitive terms before pricing comps.
